data.name: supportive
data.label: Supportive
data.description: Supportive interpretive effect: the configuration tends to help, stabilize, protect or provide usable support.
data.writing_guidance: Present as a resource, support or facilitation that the native can mobilize.

data.name: harmonious
data.label: Harmonious
data.description: Harmonious interpretive effect: the configuration tends to flow naturally, cooperate or integrate without strong friction.
data.writing_guidance: Present as ease, compatibility or natural cooperation without implying that no effort is ever needed.

data.name: dynamic_challenging
data.label: Dynamic challenging
data.description: Dynamic challenging interpretive effect: the configuration creates tension, pressure or conflict that can push action and growth.
data.writing_guidance: Present as active tension or constructive challenge, not as a purely negative outcome.

data.name: polarizing
data.label: Polarizing
data.description: Polarizing interpretive effect: the configuration draws awareness through contrast, opposition or tension between two poles.
data.writing_guidance: Present as a polarity to balance, integrate or negotiate, especially across axes or oppositions.

data.name: amplifying
data.label: Amplifying
data.description: Amplifying interpretive effect: the configuration increases visibility, strength or impact without deciding whether the outcome is favorable or difficult.
data.writing_guidance: Indicate that the factor intensifies what is already present, and combine it with another tonal valence when possible.

data.name: adjustment
data.label: Adjustment
data.description: Adjustment interpretive effect: the configuration requires adaptation between factors that do not naturally align.
data.writing_guidance: Present as a need for recalibration, practical adjustment or conscious adaptation.

data.name: subtle_adjustment
data.label: Subtle adjustment
data.description: Subtle adjustment interpretive effect: the configuration asks for small refinements or low-noise adaptation.
data.writing_guidance: Present as a small adjustment or quiet mismatch rather than a major conflict.

data.name: minor_friction
data.label: Minor friction
data.description: Minor friction interpretive effect: the configuration creates low-grade irritation, pressure or small obstacles.
data.writing_guidance: Present as manageable friction that can reveal small blocks or irritants.

data.name: creative
data.label: Creative
data.description: Creative interpretive effect: the configuration supports talent, design, patterning or expressive invention.
data.writing_guidance: Present as a creative opening, craft potential or symbolic patterning capacity.

data.name: indirect_tension
data.label: Indirect tension
data.description: Indirect tension interpretive effect: the configuration produces accumulated pressure or tension that may surface indirectly.
data.writing_guidance: Present as indirect pressure, repeated irritation or background tension that needs release.

data.name: refined_creative
data.label: Refined creative
data.description: Refined creative interpretive effect: the configuration supports intentional skill, design refinement or specialized creative expression.
data.writing_guidance: Present as refined talent, deliberate craft or precise creative intelligence.

data.name: symbolic_fated
data.label: Symbolic fated
data.description: Symbolic fated interpretive effect: the configuration carries a symbolic, compulsive or fate-like quality that should be used carefully.
data.writing_guidance: Use sparingly and avoid fatalistic wording; present as symbolic emphasis or meaningful recurrence.

data.name: spiritual_integration
data.label: Spiritual integration
data.description: Spiritual integration interpretive effect: the configuration supports inner completion, maturation or integration of subtle meaning.
data.writing_guidance: Present as inner maturation, spiritual integration or quiet completion without overstating external events.

data.name: creative_ordering
data.label: Creative ordering
data.description: Creative ordering interpretive effect: the configuration supports pattern, structure, proportion and ordered creative expression.
data.writing_guidance: Present as the ability to organize creative material into coherent form.

data.name: obsessive_focus
data.label: Obsessive focus
data.description: Obsessive focus interpretive effect: the configuration intensifies concentration, fixation or compulsion around a theme.
data.writing_guidance: Present as intensified focus or fixation, and combine with contextual factors before framing it as helpful or difficult.
